stopConditions: Any candidate, fixture, engine-contract, or manifest change after this review invalidates this digest-bound evidence and requires a fresh independent review run.
Any later reviewer disagreement or editorial rejection blocks publication of the whole immutable batch.
notes: Independent mechanical review passed. All 252 frozen fixtures and 30 fresh probes produced the expected binary grammar-only outcomes across meeting agendas, reference notes, and recommendation briefs. Fresh probes covered unrelated prose, case and spelling variation, CommonMark marker alternatives, section scoping, invisible link content, reference-link syntax, nested and HTML-only blockquotes, list ordering, hidden-only list items under current semantics, and accepted additional qualifying blocks.
